platform: A2E Uriel Covenant — Python Migration Spec

key_logic.HUNTER SYNTHESIS: 3797 chars — main scoring, opportunity ranking, confidence extraction
key_logic.DATA AGGREGATOR: 2747 chars — merges all H-module outputs into unified data structure
key_logic.H35 Influence Correlator: 2795 chars — cross-references political/lobbying data with market signals
key_logic.URIEL prompt: 2508 chars — GPT-4.1 strategic opportunity analysis system prompt
key_logic.COLOSSUS prompt: 2030 chars — Grok technical setup analysis system prompt
key_logic.Fire CIL Webhook: 1033 chars — gates CIL dispatch based on confidence threshold

api_sources: Finnhub (insider transactions, earnings calendar, IPO calendar, recommendations, candles)
TwelveData (RSI, MACD, Bollinger, ADX, ATR, EMA, Stochastic, volume, indices)

GABRIEL.Overnight Market Data: Fetches 17 symbols from Yahoo Finance v8. Sequential loop, try/except per symbol. Returns market_data dict keyed by clean symbol name.
GABRIEL.News Scanner: Fetches Finnhub general news, scans for 17 keywords (hormuz, nuclear, ceasefire, etc). 6 critical keywords escalate to NEWS_CRITICAL. Returns news_alerts array.
GABRIEL.Threshold Engine: Evaluates GREEN/YELLOW/RED. Yellow checks: ES>1%, VIX>15%, Oil>3%, Gold>2%, Silver>5%, BTC>5%, DXY rising>0.5%, VIX level>25. Red checks: ES>3%, Oil>8%, Silver>10%, DXY>1.5%, VIX>35, 3+ yellows=RED. Kill Switch: DX=F rising + ZB=F falling + VIX>30.
GABRIEL.Report Builder: Builds HTML Telegram message with market snapshot, red/yellow triggers, news alerts, kill switch warning.
GABRIEL.Gabriel Logger: Writes to Supabase gabriel_overnight_log table. UUID generation, escalation level, trigger counts, market snapshot JSON.
GABRIEL.Morning Brief: Reads last 12h from Supabase, calculates posture (RISK-ON/NEUTRAL/RISK-OFF), fetches fresh pre-market data, builds summary message.
